summary: The diff implements fixes for the infinite 'Loading your profile…' spinner as requested. ChatView.tsx adds a 10-second timeout fallback, proper loading gate logic handling all terminal states (success with data, success with null, error, timeout), and graceful fallback UI. useQueries.ts adds an 'enabled' condition tied to actor readiness, retry: false, staleTime: 30000, and custom isLoading/isFetched states accounting for actor initialization. These changes address the core requirements of REQ-19 and REQ-20.
